svg.title: Maison Paris AWS 3-tier infrastructure
svg.desc: Three-tier AWS architecture: public subnets with ALB and NAT, private subnets with ECS Fargate services, and isolated DB subnets with DocumentDB, ElastiCache, S3, and Secrets Manager.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Who are the end users of Maison Paris?')
sendPrompt('What does Route 53 do in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('How does CloudFront and WAF protect the application?')
sendPrompt('What does CloudWatch monitor in this project?')
sendPrompt('How does the Application Load Balancer route traffic between frontend and backend?')
sendPrompt('Why does the architecture need a NAT Gateway?')
sendPrompt('What is the Internet Gateway in the VPC?')
sendPrompt('How does the frontend ECS Fargate service work?')
sendPrompt('How does the backend ECS Fargate service work?')
sendPrompt('Why use DocumentDB instead of self-managed MongoDB?')
sendPrompt('What does ElastiCache Redis store in this application?')
sendPrompt('What does S3 store in this project?')
sendPrompt('What secrets are in AWS Secrets Manager?')
sendPrompt('What CloudWatch alarms are configured for this project?')
sendPrompt('What does AWS Config check in this project?')
sendPrompt('How does the AWS budget alert work?')
sendPrompt('What does IAM Access Analyzer check?')
